subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

files.fileName: Bismah Shah _May 2025 _ Kcr890 _ Final (HL) Lang and Lit  (2) (1).pdf

strengths: Demonstrates solid familiarity with key narrative episodes and sustained interpretation of familial destruction.
Effectively embeds and supports claims with wellâchosen textual references (tiger-cub simile, interior monologue, cell dialogue).
Introduction situates novel themes clearly and links consistently to the research question.
weaknesses: Analysis remains largely focused on a narrow thematic thread rather than the novelâs full breadth.
Occasional general statements about âtotalitarianismâ reduce interpretive depth.
Citation formatting is inconsistent (mixed superscript and parenthetical references).
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Band 4 is appropriate: the essay shows good knowledge and sustained interpretation with generally effective references. It does not reach the persuasive insight or flawless scholarly apparatus of Band 5, but it goes well beyond mere summary.

strengths: Offers appropriate analysis of Orwellâs textual techniques (bestial imagery, interior monologue, dialogue).
Moments of genuine insight, e.g. linking âdoleful prideâ to ideological internalization.
weaknesses: Analysis sometimes relies on description or plot summary rather than deeper evaluation.
Several paragraphs enumerate details without fully exploring thematic significance.
Insight is intermittent; sections slide into broad commentary without sustained focus.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the essay includes evaluative comments beyond mere description, recurring reliance on summary and insufficient depth in places align it more closely with Band 3 than the consistent, convincing analysis demanded by Band 4.

strengths: Logical overall structure with clear introduction, body sections, and conclusion.
Effective topic sentences and a coherent line of inquiry centered on familial destruction.
Supporting examples are mostly well integrated into paragraphs.
weaknesses: Some repetition and digressions weaken cohesion in places.
Transitions between paragraphs could be smoother to tighten the argument.
A sharper thesis preview and more concise conclusion would strengthen development.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay is well organized and mostly cohesive, with adequate development of its line of inquiry and generally smooth integration of evidence, fitting Band 4.

strengths: Language is generally clear and intelligible for literary analysis.
Academic register is maintained with appropriate critical terminology.
weaknesses: Frequent grammatical and syntactic errors (e.g., ârobbing them off their innocence,â misplaced commas).
Inconsistent citation and register lapses (occasional colloquial phrasing).
Sentence fragments and awkward constructions interrupt flow.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Lapses in grammar, punctuation, and style prevent precise expression. The clarity and register meet Band 3âs descriptor of adequate accuracy despite some errors, but do not achieve the high accuracy of higher bands.

strandSelections.reasoning: Quotations are **generally woven into sentences with grammatical integration** (e.g., âOrwell describes them as âGamboling of tiger cubs, which will soon grow up into man-eatersââ), and followed by explanation.  Page numbers appear, and external critics are footnoted.  Some mechanical glitchesâparenthetical clutter, mismatched punctuationâprevent seamless flow, but most examples sit comfortably within the prose, supporting Band 4 (âmostly well integratedâ).  Band 5 would demand consistently elegant incorporation and flawless citation, which is not yet evident.

The student demonstrates **solid familiarity with the narrative episodes surrounding the Parsons children and Winstonâs reflections**, accurately summarising the tiger-cub simile, the interior-monologue scene, and the prison-cell encounter. Discussion repeatedly links these moments to the research question of familial destruction, showing sustained interpretation (e.g., explaining how the daughterâs denunciation âpervertsâ family bonds).  While the essay stays largely on one thematic thread rather than exploring the novelâs full breadth, the handling of those chosen passages is coherent and purposeful, rising above mere summary.  Depth occasionally flattens into general statements about âtotalitarianism,â preventing the work from reaching the âpersuasiveâ calibre required for Band 5, but the knowledge and interpretation are unquestionably **good and sustained**, meriting Band 4.

The argument follows a logical progressionâintroduction, three technique-based body sections, concluding synthesisâshowing **sound overall structure and cohesion**. Topic sentences signal focus, and paragraphs build around a clear line of inquiry (how children dismantle family).  Some repetition and occasional digressions (âchapter 2 description of objectsâ) weaken tightness, yet the essay remains mostly cohesive and the inquiry is adequately developed, fulfilling Band 4.  A sharper thesis thread or smoother transitions would be required for the fully âwell-developedâ standard of Band 5.

Quotations such as âGamboling of tiger cubs,â âroared,â and Parsonsâ cell-block speech are **directly embedded in the authorâs argument and accompanied by page references**, showing effective support.  The examples are well-chosen to illustrate bestial imagery, interior monologue, and dialogue, and they generally clarify the analytical claims.  Occasional citation lapses (e.g., stray parenthetical notes, inconsistent footnote placement) limit polish, but the textual evidence remains relevant and well matched to the points made.  This aligns with Band 4, where references "support the candidateâs ideas effectively," but not Band 5, which would demand a wider range and flawless scholarly apparatus.

The student maintains an **academic register, employing critical terminology** (âbestial imagery,â âinterior monologue,â âdoublethinkâ) and generally formal tone.  However, occasional colloquial or awkward constructions (âkids nowadays,â ânipped off to the patrolsâ) and inconsistent citation style detract from full professionalism.  Thus, register is âmostly appropriateâ rather than consistently polished, aligning with Band 3.

Overall language is **clear and intelligible**, but lapses in grammar, agreement, and syntax are frequent (âThrough, the employmentâ¦â, ârobbing them off their innocenceâ).  Vocabulary is generally appropriate for literary analysis, though phrasing can be repetitive or imprecise.  These issues fit the Band 3 descriptor: clarity with âadequate accuracyâ¦ despite some lapses.â  A higher band would require greater precision and fewer distracting errors.

The essay offers **appropriate and intermittently insightful analysis of Orwellâs craft**: discussing bestial imagery, the verb âroared,â interior monologue as a âwindow,â and dialogueâs role in exposing doublethink.  These comments move beyond description to evaluate effect on theme and reader, satisfying the Band 4 descriptor.  Insight is not consistently sustainedâsome sections slide into plot restatement or broad commentary on âtotalitarian regimesââso the work stops short of the âconsistently convincingâ standard for Band 5.  Nonetheless, analytical engagement with textual choices is clear and evaluative rather than merely descriptive.

annotations.comment: The footnote style shifts between superscript and parenthetical references; adopt a consistent inâtext citation format or a single footnote convention throughout.
The phrase ârobbing them off their innocenceâ is incorrect; it should read ârobbing them of their innocenceâ to maintain precision.
This paragraph attempts multiple arguments in one block; consider dividing it to improve clarity and focus.
Footnote citation â(James M, 2024)â lacks full bibliographic detail and does not match entries in Works Cited; supply complete reference.
This description effectively illustrates how indoctrination undermines familial trust by showing how children inform on parents.
The comma placement in âThrough, the employmentâ¦â disrupts flow; remove or reposition the comma for grammatical accuracy.
To strengthen your conclusion, explicitly restate how Orwellâs devices answer the initial research question, closing the analytical loop.
The research question is clearly stated and focused, providing a strong guiding framework for the essayâs investigation.
Consider adding a concise thesis statement here that previews your argumentâs main stages to orient the reader from the outset.
The introduction effectively situates the novelâs themes and establishes context for your research question with clear understanding of Orwellâs aims.
The phrasing âLoyalty and betrayal, timeless themesâ¦ feature in a sinister mannerâ is generic; refine with more precise or original language to sharpen your academic voice.
Analysis remains close to description here; deepen the discussion by exploring how bestial imagery shapes the readerâs perception of children as agents of betrayal.
Sentence begins with a lowercase fragment (âof chapter 2â¦â); revise to form a complete, grammatically correct sentence.
The paragraph enumerates objects in the Parsonsâ apartment but does not fully analyze their thematic significance; explicitly link each item to the destruction of familial bonds.
The clause âInterior monologue a windowâ¦â is ungrammatical; insert punctuation or a verb (âInterior monologue, a windowâ¦â) for clarity.
Consider integrating a secondary critical perspective in this section to support your claims about Winstonâs interior monologue and deepen scholarly engagement.
This paragraph lacks a clear topic sentence framing the function of interior monologue; add one to guide the reader.
The final sentence of this section reads like a loose fragment; integrate it into the previous paragraph or rewrite for cohesion.
The analysis of Parsonsâ cell dialogue is insightful, especially in linking âdoleful prideâ and colloquialisms to illustrate ideological internalization.
James M. (cited in footnote 2) is not listed in Works Cited; add full bibliographic details to maintain scholarly completeness.
Work cited entries vary in style and punctuation; adopt a uniform citation style (e.g., MLA) throughout the list.
The URL for Kauffmanâs article is mistyped (âistor.orgâ); verify and correct the link to ensure accessibility.
Including the Penguin edition of 1984 ensures readers can reference your primary text; this strengthens scholarly support.
Quote integration is generally smooth here, with embedded phrases supporting your point about bestial imagery.
Page references for monologue quotes vary in style (some parenthetical, some in text); standardize parenthetical citations for clarity.
Delve deeper into Orwellâs dictionâexplore how âdoleful prideâ paradoxically conveys both shame and perverse pride, enhancing your evaluation.
Consider refining your academic register in the conclusionâavoid colloquial turns and ensure consistently formal tone.
